Terms of Service

The terms governing your use of The Pupper Club's services and client portal.

Last updated: April 22, 2026

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of The Pupper Club's website, client portal, and dog care services. By using our services or accessing the client portal, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

1. Services

The Pupper Club provides dog walking, in-home pet care visits, and related services in Port Moody, Anmore, Coquitlam, and surrounding areas in British Columbia. Our services are provided on a subscription basis, with additional a la carte services available.

2. Client Accounts

To access our client portal, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

  • Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
  • Keeping your account information, including contact details and home access instructions, accurate and up to date.
  • All activity that occurs under your account.
  • Notifying us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.

3. Home Access

By providing home access codes, keys, or entry instructions, you:

  • Authorize The Pupper Club to enter your home solely for the purpose of providing scheduled pet care services.
  • Acknowledge that access information is encrypted and stored securely, and is only accessed during scheduled visits.
  • Agree to update access information promptly if it changes.
  • Understand that access information will be deleted promptly upon termination of services.

4. Pet Care and Safety

  • You must provide accurate and complete information about your dog's health, behaviour, vaccinations, and any known issues that may affect care.
  • All dogs must have current vaccinations as required by applicable regulations.
  • The Pupper Club reserves the right to decline or discontinue service for any dog that poses a safety risk to our team, other dogs, or the public.
  • While we take every reasonable precaution, dogs are living beings and incidents may occur. The Pupper Club exercises the standard of care of a reasonably prudent pet care provider.

5. Photos and Media

  • During visits, we may take photos of your dog for visit report cards and direct communication with you through the client portal.
  • Use of your dog's photos for marketing purposes (social media, website) requires your separate, express consent, which you may grant or revoke at any time through your client profile.

6. Billing and Payment

  • Subscription fees are billed monthly in advance. Additional services are invoiced as incurred.
  • Payment is processed through Stripe. By providing payment information, you authorize recurring charges according to your selected plan.
  • Invoices are due upon receipt unless otherwise agreed. Late payments may result in suspension of services.
  • Prices are listed per household. There is no additional charge for multiple dogs in the same household.
  • A credit card processing surcharge may apply, as disclosed at the time of payment.

7. Cancellations and Rescheduling

  • Appointment cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance to avoid being charged for the visit.
  • Repeated late cancellations or no-shows may result in additional fees or service review.
  • The Pupper Club may cancel or reschedule visits due to severe weather, safety concerns, or other circumstances beyond our control. We will notify you as soon as possible.

8. Subscription Changes and Termination

  • You may pause, modify, or cancel your subscription at any time through the client portal or by contacting us directly.
  • Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds are provided for partial months.
  • The Pupper Club may terminate services at our discretion with reasonable notice if we determine the arrangement is not a good fit for either party.
  • Upon termination, your home access information will be deleted promptly and your account data will be retained only as required by law (see our Privacy Policy).

9. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law:

  • The Pupper Club's total liability for any claim arising from our services is limited to the amount you paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim.
  • We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
  • We are not responsible for damage to property that results from your dog's behaviour during a visit.
  • We are not liable for issues arising from inaccurate information provided by you, including incorrect home access codes, undisclosed health conditions, or outdated emergency contacts.

10. Client Portal

The client portal is provided for managing your services, viewing reports, communicating with our team, and handling billing. You agree to:

  • Use the portal only for its intended purpose.
  • Not attempt to access other clients' information or interfere with the portal's operation.
  • Accept that the portal may be temporarily unavailable for maintenance or updates.

11. Communications

By becoming a client, you consent to receive service-related communications from us via the client portal, email, and/or SMS, including appointment confirmations, visit reports, and invoices. You may manage your communication preferences through your client profile. Marketing communications require separate consent and include an unsubscribe option.

12. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold The Pupper Club harmless from claims, damages, or expenses arising from your breach of these Terms, inaccurate information you provide, or your dog's behaviour during services.

13. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the Province of British Columbia and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of British Columbia.

14. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify registered clients of material changes via email or the client portal at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of our services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

15. Contact

Questions about these Terms can be directed to:

The Pupper Club
Port Moody, BC
